assignments.name: Assign_Cloned_Fraud_Error_for_Editing
assignments.label: Assign Cloned Fraud & Error for Editing

assignments.name: Assign_Original_Version_Id_from_latest
assignments.label: Assign Original Version Id from latest

Flow.description: Displays a list of Fraud and Error reports for the current month as part of the Monthly reporting

formulas.name: fla_NilReturnReasonHTMLCheck
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!f_nr})), FIND("<", {!f_nr}) > 0, FIND(">", {!f_nr}, FIND("<", {!f_nr})) > FIND("<", {!f_nr}), OR( CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

formulas.name: flaMonthPriorStartDate
formulas.expression: DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, 12, MONTH(TODAY()) - 1), 1 )

Flow.interviewLabel: DESNZ - Fraud and Error Details Monthly Reporting {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: DESNZ - Fraud and Error Details Monthly Reporting

recordLookups.name: Get_Cloned_Fraud_and_Error_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Cloned Fraud and Error Record

recordLookups.name: Get_Selected_Closed_Fraud_for_Edit
recordLookups.label: Get Selected Closed Fraud for Edit

recordLookups.name: Get_Selected_Open_Fraud_for_Edit
recordLookups.label: Get Selected Open Fraud for Edit

fields.name: text
fields.fieldText:
Declaration of No Fraud or Error – {!flaMonthPriorName}


I confirm that no new cases of fraud and or error have been identified during the reporting period and there are no updates to report on any existing cases of fraud or error previously reported.

fields.name: Provide_Reason_Text
fields.fieldText: Please provide a reason why no fraud and error cases were reported this month.

validationRule.errorMessage: HTML tags are not supported in this field — please remove any tags and try again.

fields.name: Delete_confirmation_heading
fields.fieldText: ﻿Delete Fraud and Error Case Details

fields.name: PleaseConfirmTitle
fields.fieldText: Please confirm the deletion of fraud and error record: {!dtaFraudError.firstSelectedRow.Reference_Number__c}

fields.name: Case_Heading
fields.fieldText: Fraud and Error Reports for {!varReportingPeriodMonthName} / {!varCurrentMonthName}

fields.name: Select_to_review
fields.fieldText: To ensure accuracy before submitting your monthly report, please select a record from the list to review a summary of the fraud submission

fields.name: Who_committed_fraud_error_non_compliance_Other2
fields.fieldText: Who committed fraud, error non-compliance - Other

fields.name: CreateNewReports_text
fields.fieldText: Would you like to create any new Fraud and Error reports for this month?

fields.name: No_Fraud_Cases_Heading
fields.fieldText: Fraud and Error Reports for {!flaMonthPriorName} / {!flaCurrentMonthName}

fields.name: No_Fraud_Error_Reported
fields.fieldText: No Fraud and Error cases have been reported this month

fields.name: Create_New_Fraud_Error_Report
fields.fieldText: Would you like to create any new Fraud and Error reports for this month?

fields.name: FurtherReportsConfirmation
fields.fieldText: Please confirm that you have no further reports of Fraud and Error reports for this month

subflows.name: Create_New_Fraud_and_Error_Report
subflows.label: Create New Fraud and Error Report

subflows.name: DENZ_Edit_Report_Fraud_and_Error
subflows.label: DENZ - Edit Report Fraud and Error
